s2_signal_interpretation: The post-hoc S2 signal proxy ranges over [0.0104, 0.0108] km^-1 across kappa values, indicating the real network provides a non-trivial spatial gradient for the dual-process layer to act on.
paper_language: Routing QoIs (corridor fraction, path-length-at-arrival) varied 4.1% across kappa in [12, 28], consistent with Day 9's identification of a flat L2 surface. The operating point kappa = 18.4 is validated for routing predictions on the real OSM network.
s2_signal_method: post-hoc proxy: max over neighbours of (c_here - c_nb)/d_nb averaged over non-camp blend rows
